title: Summer of crypto (regs): State of Crypto
summary: Lawmakers are debating taxes, the CFTC put out a prediction market proposal and court cases are heating up.

title: Aerodrome is turning liquidity into a prediction market with its biggest upgrade yet
summary: The concept, called Predictive Allocation, will encourage participants to anticipate where liquidity will be needed next, instead of rewarding them for directing incentives toward pools that have already generated fees.

title: SEC's big swing to clear tokenization path isn't likely to get resilience of full rule
summary: Former SEC lawyers say that using its power to grant tokenization "innovation" efforts an exemption from securities law isn't as strong as a full-fledged rule.

title: Wall Street and crypto are crashing into each other as tokenized treasury markets hit $14.6 billion
summary: Not all crypto exchange executives agree, but the data does not lie: centralized exchange trading volumes dropped more than 11% to $4.61 trillion, their lowest since late 2024.

title: Crypto’s next billion-dollar hacker may move at superhuman speed
summary: Anthropic’s new Claude Fable 5 puts powerful cyber tools behind safety filters. DeFi, already hit by more than $840 million in hacks this year, is one of the industries with the most to lose if the filters fail.
